reasoning: Captain America: Brave New World ended its run making roughly $200 million domestically. We already have conclusive evidence that other movies have made vastly more than this in 2025, including "A Minecraft Movie" at $424 million and "Lilo & Stitch" at $390 million, as well as "Superman" passing $292 million. As such, it is mathematically impossible for Captain America: Brave New World to be the top grossing domestic film of 2025, since its theatrical run has essentially concluded and multiple films have vastly outperformed it.
